overall_result.disclaimer: This assessment measures evidence quality in uploaded documents. Final NAAC grade requires DVV peer team verification of data templates.

improvement_suggestions: Upload more documentation for 7 criterion/criteria with weak evidence: Criterion 1, Criterion 2, Criterion 3, Criterion 4, Criterion 5, Criterion 6, Criterion 7
To improve evidence quality, focus on uploading comprehensive documents for high-weight criteria: Criterion 2 (Teaching-Learning, 350 points) and Criterion 3 (Research, 200 points)
Ensure documents include: quantitative data, tables with metrics, policy documents, and achievement reports
Remember: This assessment measures documentation quality. Final NAAC grade depends on DVV verification of your submitted data templates.

gaps: No evidence of specific value-added courses offered by the institution
Missing year-wise breakdown of value-added courses
No data on the number of students enrolled or completing value-added courses
recommendations: Launch 5 value-added courses (with 30 or more contact hours) in the next academic year, targeting 200 students per course. Apply for AICTE funding (₹5-10 Lakhs per course) to support these courses. Partner with industry partners (e.g., IBM, Microsoft) to offer courses in emerging areas like AI, Data Analytics, and Cybersecurity. Establish a Centre for Skill Development to oversee these courses and target 80% completion rate for students enrolled. Allocate ₹20 Lakhs for marketing and promoting these courses to attract students.
